text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's a paradiiise! ♪ Warm water feels so niiice! ♪
Oasis of the shopping district! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I used my day off to go to the bathhouse in
the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I went in the sauna, relaxed in the massage chair...
I even chugged a bottle of carrot milk!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It was a full-on spa day!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll take you there too next time. It'll fix you right
up!
